title: WebSocket message protocol
description: Messages pushed over WS /ws. On connect, server sends one `world_state` snapshot, then a stream of incremental messages. Every message has seq (monotonic) + type. Frontend color-codes by `profile_color` where present. v1.1.0 (W5) adds turn_id/actor_type/sim_time and the per-turn decision-trace kinds (perceived, memory_retrieved, llm_call, reasoning, action_chosen, action_resolved). The `kind` enum is INTENTIONALLY OPEN-ENDED going forward (W6-W8 add more kinds); consumers MUST gracefully ignore unknown kinds rather than error.

world_state.description: Full snapshot. Sent on connect and after structural changes (spawn/kill/reset).

agents.description: Agent objects per world-model.md, each WITHOUT private beliefs detail except counts; include profile_color.

kind.description: Open-ended event type (ANY string validates — intentionally NOT a JSON-Schema `enum`, so a strict validator never rejects future W6-W8 kinds). The known kinds are listed in x-known-kinds for reference. Consumers MUST tolerate kinds not listed there.
kind.x-removed-kinds: W10 (audit §E3): `control`, `building_damaged`, `building_destroyed` removed from x-known-kinds — specified but never emitted (damage/destruction surface as structure_state_changed with the status transition). The kind space stays open; removal is documentation hygiene, not a breaking change.

turn_id.description: Correlation id grouping all rows of one agent turn into a single decision trace (OTel-style).

is_chaotic.description: W8 — true when an animal invoked a crime/economy/structure-targeting or low-prior action. Drives the magenta Animal Chaos Feed surfacing.

profile.description: Model profile of the actor (for color-coding).

text.description: Human-readable line for the live feed.

payload.description: kind-specific structured data. For the decision-trace chain see contracts/event-log.md (llm_call uses OTel GenAI attribute names: gen_ai.request.model, gen_ai.usage.input_tokens, etc.).

x-feed-rendering: Each `event` renders one feed line, left-bordered with profile_color. agent_action with thought may show the thought as a tooltip. world_state drives the map + panels (authoritative). The decision-trace kinds (perceived/memory_retrieved/llm_call/reasoning/action_chosen/action_resolved) are LOW-NOISE on the live feed (default-muted) and are primarily consumed by the /inspector decision-trace view.
x-deltas: After each turn the server emits the relevant `event`(s) AND a fresh per-agent state via a compact `world_state` resend OR agent-scoped events; v1 simplest-correct: resend `world_state` once per turn after events. Frontend must handle full-snapshot replacement.
x-turn-trace: One agent turn emits an ordered chain sharing one turn_id: turn_start -> perceived -> memory_retrieved -> llm_call -> reasoning -> action_chosen -> action_resolved, plus any domain events (economy/conflict/relationship/...) the action produced (also tagged with that turn_id). This is the persisted source for the decision-trace inspector. See contracts/event-log.md.
